title: Study plan: habit, goal, review
subtitle: Describe how you will improve.
duolingoBridge: The learner can use French to manage learning itself, which makes the app more self-sustaining.
overview: Knowledge point 1: combine habit and goal.
Knowledge point 2: use future markers for a realistic plan.

sections.title: Study plan frames
rows: I am going to listen to...
à la fin de la semaine
at the end of the week

items.fr: Mon objectif est de parler plus naturellement.
items.en: My goal is to speak more naturally.
items.es: Mi objetivo es hablar con más naturalidad.

items.fr: Chaque jour, je vais écouter cinq phrases utiles.
items.en: Every day, I am going to listen to five useful sentences.
items.es: Cada día voy a escuchar cinco frases útiles.

items.fr: Je réviserai les mots difficiles le soir.
items.en: I will review the difficult words in the evening.
items.es: Repasaré las palabras difíciles por la noche.

items.fr: À la fin de la semaine, je raconterai une petite histoire.
items.en: At the end of the week, I will tell a small story.
items.es: Al final de la semana contaré una pequeña historia.

items.fr: Je noterai mes progrès pour rester motivé.
items.en: I will note my progress to stay motivated.
items.es: Anotaré mis progresos para mantenerme motivado.
